original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL â€” not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (â‰ˆ40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections â€” this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections â€” assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading â†’ body gap: 16px. Paragraph â†’ paragraph: 16px. Body â†’ callout/CTA: 24px. Image â†’ caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: â‰¥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

relations.note: Cardinality limit applies alongside the primary CTA styling spec.

quotes: Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column

rules.intent: Ensure consistent canvas width and grid so assembled sections stack seamlessly.
rules.rule_text: Email body width is fixed at 600px (canvas.email.width = 600px), centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly. At the mobile breakpoint (canvas.email.mobile_breakpoint = 480px) all multi-column layouts collapse to single column. Internal section grid uses a 12-column mental model (section.grid.columns = 12); practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50, layout.two_col.ratio = 50/50), or image/text split (â‰ˆ40/60).

quotes: Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8
Heading â†’ body gap: 16px. Paragraph â†’ paragraph: 16px. Body â†’ callout/CTA: 24px. Image â†’ caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Enforce consistent spacing rhythm enabling zero-gap section assembly.
rules.rule_text: Section side padding is 24px left/right (section.padding.sides = 24px), consistent across ALL sections â€” this is what makes assembly seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px but text within them still respects 24px insets. Vertical rhythm uses an 8px base unit (section.base_unit = 8px) â€” all padding/margins are multiples of 8. Each section owns its own top AND bottom internal padding of 32px (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px) with no external margins between sections (zero-gap stacking). Gaps: headingâ†’body 16px (section.gap.heading_body = 16px), paragraphâ†’paragraph 16px, bodyâ†’callout/CTA 24px (section.gap.body_callout = 24px), imageâ†’caption 8px (section.gap.image_caption = 8px).

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics

Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: â‰¥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Maintain approved, accessible CTA button treatment.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use Brand Blue background (cta.button.fill = #00529b), White text (cta.button.label_color = #ffffff), Nunito Sans Bold 16px label (cta.button.label_type), padding 14px 32px (cta.button.padding), minimum touch target 48px height (cta.button.min_touch = 48px, brand accessibility rule: â‰¥48px clickable areas), and a fully rounded pill corner radius of 24px (cta.button.radius = 24px). Secondary CTA uses White background, 2px Brand Blue border (cta.button.secondary_border = 2px Brand Blue), Brand Blue text, same metrics.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Prevent competing calls to action within a single section.
rules.rule_text: One primary CTA per section maximum.
